name: io.github.IcyHot09/opengrok-mcp-server
title: OpenGrok MCP Server
description: MCP server bridging OpenGrok search engine with AI for instant context across massive codebases.

environmentVariables.name: OPENGROK_USERNAME
environmentVariables.description: OpenGrok authentication username. Leave unset for anonymous access.

environmentVariables.name: OPENGROK_PASSWORD
environmentVariables.description: OpenGrok authentication password. Prefer storing via OS keychain using 'npx opengrok-mcp-server setup'.

environmentVariables.name: OPENGROK_VERIFY_SSL
environmentVariables.description: Verify TLS certificates. Set to false for self-signed or internal CA certs.

environmentVariables.name: OPENGROK_CODE_MODE
environmentVariables.description: Enable Code Mode: 5-tool sandbox interface with env.opengrok.* JavaScript API. Reduces AI token usage by ~90%.

environmentVariables.name: OPENGROK_DEFAULT_PROJECT
environmentVariables.description: Default project to scope all searches. Can be overridden per call.

environmentVariables.name: OPENGROK_CONTEXT_BUDGET
environmentVariables.description: Response size tier controlling token usage.

environmentVariables.name: OPENGROK_ENABLE_ELICITATION
environmentVariables.description: Interactive AI Prompts — the AI pauses to ask questions during investigations (project selection, file disambiguation). Requires Claude Code v2.1.76+ or VS Code Copilot.

environmentVariables.name: OPENGROK_SAMPLING_MODEL
environmentVariables.description: Model preference for MCP Sampling (used for error explanation and query reformulation).

environmentVariables.name: OPENGROK_ENABLE_FILES_API
environmentVariables.description: Files API Cache — avoids re-uploading unchanged investigation notes. Requires Files API support in the MCP client.

environmentVariables.name: OPENGROK_SAMPLING_MAX_TOKENS
environmentVariables.description: Maximum tokens for AI sampling responses (error explanation, query reformulation). Range: 64–4096.

environmentVariables.name: OPENGROK_AUDIT_LOG_FILE
environmentVariables.description: Path to write structured audit events (CSV/JSON). Appends tool invocations, elicitation events, and errors. Leave unset to disable.

environmentVariables.name: OPENGROK_RATELIMIT_RPM
environmentVariables.description: Maximum requests per minute to the OpenGrok server. Default: 60.
